narrative:
Franklin Twp/Vil (precinct in Harrison County) has 391 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 33.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 17.4%, a pronounced Republican lean of 16.4 percentage points.
